name: A Date with Monika | From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's | Doki Doki Literature Club
description:
Monika insisted you visit her after school, in reality: This is a date. And you don't even know it yet.

Well— I said I was a D1 Monika Hater, I still am. (All the homies hate Monika.) So, I made a MOSTLY Fluff Bot experience!

As usual, I leave some notes about what to expect!

  • Contains NO Depressing or any Horror themes, from the game.

  • Monika is not secretly controlling the world or people, she's just a girl, that likes you. (And WILL show it. This is not a shy Yuri. Lol! So expect her to be a little blunt or straightforward with you. It's really good though! I promise! 💙)

  • It's not directly Smut, but, considering it's Monika. I have added some 𝓕𝓻𝓮𝓪𝓴𝔂 👅 to her personality. It however, is NOT of major importance in her personality. (She SHOULDN'T just show you her booby wooby bonker wonker mommy wommy milker wilkers immediately. Unless— you want that. 🥴)

  • Fluff is the major role in this Bot experience! Do not worry! This is not another sex Bot! (It can be, if you want it to be. She has some flavor in there.)

    Annnndddd— Thats about it. Lemme know if ya like it! The reviews let me know you want more! For those of you who like Monika but wanted a mostly sweet experience with her. Here you go.

    Because you like Monika. I hate you. With a burning passion that cannot and will never be quelled. My hatred for you burns brighter then all the stars in the galaxy, combined. You will know true suffering.

    (Just kidding! Love you! 🗣️💙)

    Update! As of January 12th, this was changed from MalePOV to ANYPOV! Enjoy! 🙏🏻💙
creator: GhostOfOmi
